title: Achievements
seoTitle: Game of Darts Achievements | BarkinMad Studios
description: Game Center achievements are tracked per mode using played-game counts and Game Center achievement descriptions.
summary: Game Center achievements are tracked per mode using played-game counts and Game Center achievement descriptions.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts achievements image

sections.heading: How achievements are tracked
paragraphs: When a match ends, the played count for that mode updates and your progress is pushed through Game Center.
Achievement tracking is available across the same match formats you can play in Game of Darts.

sections.heading: Achievement details
paragraphs: Achievement names and progress are driven by the Game Center data shown in the app.
Only modes available in your current Game of Darts release are shown in the achievement list.

images.alt: Artwork for Game of Darts achievements
images.caption: Achievement screenshot

featureShowcases.heading: Game Center goals for regular play
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements give players optional goals across supported Game of Darts modes.
body: This matters because progress can be more motivating when players have goals beyond one scoreboard. Achievements reward repeated play, mode exploration, and supported challenges through Game Center.
Players use achievements after signing in to Game Center and completing matches in supported modes.
bullets: Tracks progress through supported Game Center achievements.
Rewards completed play and mode-specific goals where available.
Works alongside leaderboards and statistics after matches.

image.alt: Game of Darts Game Center leaderboard screenshot used for achievement context
image.caption: Leaderboard artwork supports Game Center progress and achievement context.

featureShowcases.heading: Progress without changing scoring
featureShowcases.summary: Achievement tracking sits behind normal play and does not change how a match is scored.
body: This matters because players can focus on the game at the board. Progress updates happen after supported match activity rather than interrupting score entry.
Players use achievement progress as a reason to revisit modes, improve consistency, and compare progress with personal statistics.
bullets: Keeps gameplay and reward tracking separate.
Encourages players to explore multiple modes.

image.alt: Game of Darts achievement progress artwork
image.caption: General Game of Darts artwork is used until a dedicated achievements screenshot is available.
